title: AN ACT DECLARING THE FIFTH DAY OF OCTOBER OF EVERY YEAR AS THE NATIONAL TEACHERSГўВҖВҷ DAY

chunks.text:
S. No. 510 H. No. 4148 ; Manila Bulletin and Philippine Star Star (February 3, 2016); 112 OG No. 11, 1336 (March 14, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10743, January 29, 2016 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE FIFTH DAY OF OCTOBER OF EVERY YEAR AS THE NATIONAL TEACHERSГўВҖВҷ DAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

National TeachersГўВҖВҷ Day.

ГўВҖВ“ The fifth day of October of every year is hereby declared as the ГўВҖВңNational TeachersГўВҖВҷ DayГўВҖВқ.

To ensure a meaningful observance of this special working holiday, all heads of government agencies and instrumentalities, including government-owned and -controlled corporations especially those that are directly dealing with the teachers, including local government units, and employers in the private sector, shall encourage and afford sufficient time and opportunities for their employees to engage and participate in any activity conducted within the premises of their offices or establishments in celebration of the ГўВҖВңNational TeachersГўВҖВҷ DayГўВҖВқ.

SEC. 2.

Lead Agency.

ГўВҖВ“ Pursuant to the observance of the National TeachersГўВҖВҷ Day, the annual program of activities shall be prepared and implemented with the Department of Education as the lead agency.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen 15 days after its complete publication in the Official Gazette or in at least two (2) newspapers of general circulation, whichever comes earlier.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

Senate Bill No. 510, which was approved by the Senate on May 18, 2015, was adopted by the House of Representatives as an amendment to House Bill No. 4148 on November 25, 2015.

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: JAN 29 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
